finding: The sanitized direct Pages project probe can now produce a canonical hostname-authority artifact before deployment and can be deterministically rebound to Wrangler's returned deployment URL after a successful deployment.

implementation.post_deploy_step: Bind deployment URL to Pages hostname authority

verification.method: commit-bound source inspection through GitHub connector
checks: hostname-authority unit test added to the workflow contract suite
pre-deploy builder invocation is gated on successful sanitized access probe
post-deploy invocation receives Wrangler's returned deployment URL
hostname-authority artifact is included in the uploaded proof bundle
run summary documents the authority artifact and its epistemic limit

epistemic_limit: Workflow wiring and control-plane hostname authority do not prove that DNS resolves, HTTP is reachable, the intended research surface is served, or the deployed commit matches until the externally configured workflow runs successfully.
falsification_route: configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment secrets
dispatch the workflow at commit 00056ceee133ef8d2b9ad29cc6b7c0df496e80d4 or a descendant
reject the claim if deployment.bound is false or the hostname relation is unbound
independently test DNS, HTTP, served identity, and exact deployed commit
